creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Sat Mar 29 08:03:28 2014
New Revision: 349484
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349484
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349484/

Log:
  - Update to 1.011.1 [1]
  - Fix plist
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  
  Changes:	http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/NEZUMI/MIME-Charset-1.011.1/Changes
  PR:		ports/187477 [1]
  Submitted by: 	Geoffroy Desvernay <dgeo@centrale-marseille.fr>
  Approved by:	Olivier.Girard@univ-angers.fr (maintainer timeout, >14 days)

Modified:
  head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/Makefile
  head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/distinfo
  head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/pkg-plist

Modified: head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 08:00:53 2014	(r349483)
+++ head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/Makefile	Sat Mar 29 08:03:28 2014	(r349484)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	MIME-Charset
-PORTVERSION=	1.008
+PORTVERSION=	1.011.1
 CATEGORIES=	mail perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	Olivier.Girard@univ-angers.fr
 COMMENT=	Charset Informations for MIME
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

--- head/mail/p5-MIME-Charset/distinfo	Sat Mar 29 08:00:53 2014	(r349483)

+SIZE (MIME-Charset-1.011.1.tar.gz) = 54333

-%%PERL5_MAN3%%/MIME::Charset::JA_JP.3.gz
+%%PERL5_MAN3%%/POD2::JA::MIME::Charset.3.gz
